increments.name: User Story 1 - Opt Into Compiler-Accurate Graph Precision

source.heading: ## Phase 3: User Story 1 - Opt Into Compiler-Accurate Graph Precision (Priority: P1, Slice 1 MVP)

tasks.title: Write failing disabled-path index, sync, and watch-triggered sync tests proving zero LSP command probes, subprocess starts, JSON-RPC messages, status writes, and graph mutations in `__tests__/lsp-disabled.test.ts`
Write failing CLI activation tests for `codegraph index`, `codegraph index --lsp`, and `codegraph index --no-lsp` precedence in `__tests__/lsp-config.test.ts`
Write failing JSON-RPC lifecycle tests for initialize, request id routing, timeout, shutdown, stderr/stdout draining, and malformed response handling in `__tests__/lsp-client.test.ts`
Write failing TypeScript-family precision-pass tests for complete definition/reference verification paths in `__tests__/lsp-precision-pass.test.ts`
Write failing status tests for CLI activation source, observed server evidence, per-language coverage, and edge counts in `__tests__/lsp-status.test.ts`
Write failing TypeScript-family real-server prereq validation tests for `typescript-language-server --stdio` and TypeScript SDK evidence in `__tests__/lsp-real-server-validation.test.ts`
Add `--lsp` and `--no-lsp` index activation options without changing default behavior in `src/bin/codegraph.ts`
Pass effective LSP activation from CLI and project config into index and sync entry points in `src/index.ts`
Implement the JSON-RPC stdio client lifecycle in `src/lsp/client.ts`
Implement bounded request timeout, shutdown, process exit, stdout draining, and stderr draining behavior in `src/lsp/client.ts`
Implement TypeScript-family work-item selection after structural extraction and reference resolution in `src/lsp/precision-pass.ts`
Implement verified-edge marking for matching TypeScript-family LSP targets in `src/lsp/precision-pass.ts`
Persist slice-1 coverage, edge-count, and performance status for LSP-enabled runs in `src/lsp/status.ts`
Integrate the LSP precision pass after existing reference resolution while preserving disabled-path behavior in `src/index.ts`
Render LSP state in human and JSON status output without starting language servers from status in `src/bin/codegraph.ts`
Implement TypeScript-family real-server validation in `scripts/spec-008-validate-real-servers.mjs`
Run `npm test -- __tests__/lsp-disabled.test.ts __tests__/lsp-client.test.ts __tests__/lsp-precision-pass.test.ts` and record output in `specs/008-lsp-client-integration/validation/slice-1.md`
Run TypeScript-family real-server validation and record observed command, resolved path, version, SDK evidence, and coverage in `specs/008-lsp-client-integration/validation/slice-1.md`
Record slice-1 traceability, scope budget, non-goals, rollback note, and known gaps in `specs/008-lsp-client-integration/validation/slice-1.md`

increments.name: User Story 2 - Configure Local Language-Server Behavior

source.heading: ## Phase 4: User Story 2 - Configure Local Language-Server Behavior (Priority: P2, Slice 1)

tasks.title: Write failing project config tests for `lsp.enabled`, `lsp.defaultTimeoutMs`, `lsp.watch.enabled`, and `lsp.servers.<language>` values in `__tests__/lsp-config.test.ts`

Write failing invalid override tests proving malformed JSON, non-string argv elements, and invalid timeouts warn and fall back in `__tests__/lsp-config.test.ts`
Write failing command probing tests for PATH lookup, absolute argv, relative argv, selected argv reporting, and expected alternatives in `__tests__/lsp-prereqs.test.ts`
Write failing configured-command unavailable tests proving valid configured argv does not fall through to registry alternatives in `__tests__/lsp-prereqs.test.ts`

Implement timeout precedence and validation for project and environment values in `src/lsp/config.ts`

Implement PATH, absolute path, and relative path command resolution with configured-command no-fallback semantics in `src/lsp/prereqs.ts`
Apply environment command and timeout overrides during index runtime without allowing environment-only activation in `src/bin/codegraph.ts`

increments.name: User Story 3 - Understand LSP Availability and Graceful Degradation

source.heading: ## Phase 5: User Story 3 - Understand LSP Availability and Graceful Degradation (Priority: P2, Slice 1 and Slice 2)

tasks.title: Write failing missing-server degradation tests for normal runtime in `__tests__/lsp-prereqs.test.ts`
Write failing crash, initialize timeout, request timeout, malformed response, and shutdown failure tests in `__tests__/lsp-client.test.ts`
Write failing one-restart-per-language-per-run tests for bounded recovery in `__tests__/lsp-client.test.ts`
Write failing status tests for unavailable, skipped, degraded, not-present, not-applicable, and validation-only reason categories in `__tests__/lsp-status.test.ts`

Write failing performance enforcement and status tests for elapsed time, full-index per-language source-file caps, candidate work-item caps, 250-item LSP batch size, active session high-water mark, in-flight request high-water mark, cap-exceeded skip reasons, and deterministic no-unbounded-fallback behavior in `__tests__/lsp-status.test.ts` and `__tests__/lsp-precision-pass.test.ts`
Map missing, crashed, timed-out, malformed, and shutdown-failed server conditions to per-language degradation in `src/lsp/prereqs.ts` and `src/lsp/status.ts`
Implement at-most-one fresh session restart per language per explicit index or sync run in `src/lsp/client.ts`
Implement checked, verified, corrected, suppressed, skipped-by-reason, and degraded counters in `src/lsp/status.ts`

Implement structural-index elapsed time, LSP elapsed time, enabled-overhead ratio, full-index per-language file/work caps, 250-item batching, active session concurrency limit, request concurrency limit, session high-water, and request high-water status records in `src/lsp/precision-pass.ts`, `src/lsp/client.ts`, and `src/lsp/status.ts`
Add deterministic missing, crashed, timed-out, malformed, and shutdown-failure fake server fixtures in `__tests__/fixtures/lsp/degradation/README.md`
Ensure `codegraph status` reads recorded LSP state and does not start or probe language servers solely because status is requested in `src/bin/codegraph.ts`

Run `npm test -- __tests__/lsp-prereqs.test.ts __tests__/lsp-client.test.ts __tests__/lsp-status.test.ts __tests__/lsp-precision-pass.test.ts` and record output in `specs/008-lsp-client-integration/validation/slice-2.md`

Record graceful-degradation, full-index cap enforcement, batch-size enforcement, session/request concurrency, and no-unbounded-fallback evidence for missing, crashed, timed-out, malformed, shutdown-failed, and cap-exceeded scenarios in `specs/008-lsp-client-integration/validation/slice-2.md`

increments.name: User Story 4 - Complete SPEC-008 With No Unowned Parity Gaps
